ValidationRule.description: Hold Reason is required when Training Stage is On Hold
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL(Training_Stage__c, "On Hold"), ISBLANK(TEXT(On_Hold_Reason__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select On Hold Reason to save the record.
